ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the data was collected from */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data was collected for */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection session */,
  "data_type" INTEGER /* ID of the data type (e.g., EEG, EMG, fNIRS) */,
  "frequency_band" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency band (e.g., alpha, beta, gamma) */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental condition (e.g., rest, task, stimulation) */,
  "sample_rate" REAL /* Sampling rate of the data */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, HDF5) */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "collection_device" TEXT /* Device used for data collection */,
  "collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality score or flag for the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency_band FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_band") REFERENCES frequency_bands ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the subject */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the subject */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the subject */,
  "consent_form" TEXT /* ID or reference of the signed consent form */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the subject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subject was added */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the subject's information */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subject's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "ethics_approval" TEXT /* ID or reference of the ethics approval */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the session belongs to */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the session was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the session */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., EEG, EMG, fNIRS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "measurement_units" TEXT /* Units used for measurements (e.g., μV, mV) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data type was added */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency band */,
  "band_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency band (e.g., alpha, beta, gamma) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency band */,
  "frequency_range" TEXT /* Range of the frequency band (e.g., 8-12 Hz) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the frequency band */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the frequency band was added */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the frequency band */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the frequency band was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., rest, task, stimulation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the condition */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was added */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the condition */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, HDF5) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the file */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user's information */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eye_detection" (
  "eye_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eye detection event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the eye detection belongs to */,
  "eye_detection" REAL /* Eye detection value */,
  "split" TEXT /* Split type (e.g., valid, test, train) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the eye detection event */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the eye detection */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the eye detection event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the eye detection event was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eye_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eye_detection_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "af3" (
  "af3_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AF3 value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the AF3 value belongs to */,
  "af3_value" REAL /* AF3 signal value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the AF3 signal value */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the AF3 signal value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the AF3 value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the AF3 value was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("af3_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_af3_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "f7" (
  "f7_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each F7 value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the F7 value belongs to */,
  "f7_value" REAL /* F7 signal value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the F7 signal value */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the F7 signal value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the F7 value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the F7 value was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("f7_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_f7_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
